{
  "cefr_level": "A2",
  "level_basis": {
    "textinspector_level_raw": null,
    "flesch_kincaid": null,
    "rule_notes": "Holistic estimation: basic vocabulary range, simple sentence structures, multiple grammar errors (prepositions, agreement), spelling errors. Borderline A2/B1; applied lower-level rule for reliability."
  },
  "communicative_task_achievement": "Yes",
  "communicative_task_notes": [
    "Addresses the Telegram post appropriately with a helpful, empathetic tone.",
    "Provides three clear tips on organizing time (apps/calendars, limiting social media, sleep/food).",
    "Meets the 10-sentence requirement (11 sentences total)."
  ],
  "grammar_score": 0.58,
  "corrections": [
    "i -> I (Punctuation; A1; Low)",
    "simular -> similar (Lexis; A2; Medium)",
    "Here is the tips -> Here are the tips (Grammar; A2; Medium)",
    "this apps -> these apps (Grammar; A1; Medium)",
    "spend a lot of time to TV -> spend a lot of time on TV (Grammar; A2; Medium)",
    "leave from useless groups -> leave useless groups (Grammar; B1; Medium)",
    "at VK -> on VK (Grammar; A2; Low)",
    "enought -> enough (Lexis; A2; Medium)",
    "I hope, my tips -> I hope my tips (Punctuation; A2; Low)",
    "write me at personal messages -> write to me in private messages (Grammar; B1; High)"
  ],
  "errors_by_category": {
    "Lexis": [
      {"excerpt": "simular", "correction": "similar", "comment": "Spelling error; common adjective 'similar' misspelled.", "impact": "Medium", "cefr_threshold": "A2"},
      {"excerpt": "enought", "correction": "enough", "comment": "Spelling error; quantifier 'enough' misspelled.", "impact": "Medium", "cefr_threshold": "A2"},
      {"excerpt": "personal messages", "correction": "private messages", "comment": "Awkward collocation; 'private messages' is the standard phrase for this context.", "impact": "Medium", "cefr_threshold": "B1"}
    ],
    "Grammar": [
      {"excerpt": "Here is the tips", "correction": "Here are the tips", "comment": "Subject-verb agreement error; 'tips' is plural, requires 'are'.", "impact": "Medium", "cefr_threshold": "A2"},
      {"excerpt": "this apps", "correction": "these apps", "comment": "Demonstrative agreement; plural noun requires 'these'.", "impact": "Medium", "cefr_threshold": "A1"},
      {"excerpt": "spend a lot of time to TV", "correction": "spend a lot of time on TV", "comment": "Preposition error; 'spend time on' is the correct pattern.", "impact": "Medium", "cefr_threshold": "A2"},
      {"excerpt": "leave from useless groups", "correction": "leave useless groups", "comment": "Unnecessary preposition; 'leave' + direct object, no 'from' needed.", "impact": "Medium", "cefr_threshold": "B1"},
      {"excerpt": "at VK", "correction": "on VK", "comment": "Preposition error; platforms use 'on' (on VK, on Facebook).", "impact": "Low", "cefr_threshold": "A2"},
      {"excerpt": "write me", "correction": "write to me", "comment": "Verb pattern; 'write to someone' requires the preposition 'to'.", "impact": "Medium", "cefr_threshold": "A2"}
    ],
    "Punctuation": [
      {"excerpt": "i", "correction": "I", "comment": "Capitalization; first-person pronoun 'I' must always be capitalized.", "impact": "Low", "cefr_threshold": "A1"},
      {"excerpt": "I hope, my tips", "correction": "I hope my tips", "comment": "Unnecessary comma after 'hope'; no clause boundary here.", "impact": "Low", "cefr_threshold": "A2"}
    ],
    "Word order": [],
    "Sentence structure": [],
    "Text organization": [],
    "Discourse markers": [],
    "Rhetorical features": [],
    "Register": [],
    "Incomprehensibility": []
  },
  "strengths": [
    {"item": "Numbered list organization (1), 2), 3))", "cefr_level": "B1", "category": "Discourse marker", "note": "Clear structural organization typical of B1 writing; helps reader follow tips."},
    {"item": "that helped me", "cefr_level": "B1", "category": "Grammar", "note": "Correct relative clause structure."},
    {"item": "You can find", "cefr_level": "B1", "category": "Grammar", "note": "Modal verb 'can' used correctly for suggestion."}
  ],
  "feedback": "CEFR Level: A2. The text communicates the message clearly and provides relevant, practical tips in an appropriate informal register for a Telegram chat response. However, the vocabulary range is limited to basic everyday words, and there are consistent grammar errors (prepositions, subject-verb agreement, demonstratives) along with spelling mistakes. The numbered list organization is a B1 feature, and some correct relative/modal structures show emerging B1 control, but the overall grammatical accuracy and lexical range keep the text at A2. Applied borderline rule: when uncertain between A2 and B1, selected the lower level for reliability.",
  "next_steps": [
    "Review subject-verb agreement rules, especially with plural nouns ('Here are the tips', 'these apps').",
    "Practice preposition patterns: 'spend time ON something', 'write TO someone', 'ON social media platforms'.",
    "Focus on common spelling patterns to avoid errors like 'simular' → 'similar' and 'enought' → 'enough'."
  ]
}

{
  "cefr_level": "A2",
  "level_basis": {
    "textinspector_level_raw": null,
    "flesch_kincaid": null,
    "rule_notes": "Estimated holistically. Pervasive spelling errors (abot, reccommend, simplie, futcher, expirience, habbits, realy, beleave, unlacky) indicate A2 control. Vocabulary ambition (networking, motivation, time management) and discourse markers (Firstly, Secondly, Also) suggest B1 range, but grammar control (verb patterns, relative pronouns, articles) remains at A2. Applied borderline rule: selected lower level for reliability."
  },
  "communicative_task_achievement": "NC",
  "communicative_task_notes": [
    "Task required tips on organizing days; first tip (communicate with people) addresses motivation rather than time organization.",
    "Second tip (track time, identify bad habits) is relevant to the task.",
    "Sentence count approximately 10-11, meeting length requirement."
  ],
  "grammar_score": 0.48,
  "corrections": [
    "say you abot -> tell you about (Lexis; B1; High)",
    "two my own tips -> my two own tips (Word order; A2; Medium)",
    "what help me -> which help me (Grammar; B1; Medium)",
    "I reccommend more communicate -> I recommend communicating more (Grammar; B1; High)",
    "look to life simplie -> look at life simply (Grammar; A2; Medium)",
    "can give somr motivation to you -> can give you some motivation (Word order; A2; Medium)",
    "In futcher -> In the future (Grammar; A2; Medium)",
    "networking give you -> networking will give you (Grammar; A2; Medium)",
    "a lot opportunity -> a lot of opportunities (Grammar; A2; Medium)",
    "need count -> need to count (Grammar; A2; Medium)",
    "you think what you study -> you think that you study (Grammar; B1; Medium)",
    "hasn't free time -> don't have free time (Grammar; A2; High)",
    "try note your day -> try noting your day (Grammar; B1; Medium)",
    "habbits what take -> habits that take (Grammar; B1; Medium)",
    "live more free -> live more freely (Grammar; A2; Low)",
    "tips help you -> tips will help you (Grammar; A2; Low)",
    "abot -> about (Punctuation; A1; Medium)",
    "reccommend -> recommend (Punctuation; A2; Medium)",
    "simplie -> simply (Punctuation; A2; Medium)",
    "somr -> some (Punctuation; A1; Low)",
    "futcher -> future (Punctuation; A2; Medium)",
    "expirience -> experience (Punctuation; A2; Medium)",
    "habbits -> habits (Punctuation; A2; Medium)",
    "realy -> really (Punctuation; A2; Low)",
    "Delite -> Delete (Punctuation; A2; Medium)",
    "beleave -> believe (Punctuation; A2; Medium)",
    "unlacky -> unlucky (Punctuation; A2; Low)",
    "Firstly I -> Firstly, I (Punctuation; B1; Low)",
    "Also they -> Also, they (Punctuation; B1; Low)",
    "Secondly you -> Secondly, you (Punctuation; B1; Low)",
    "you are unlacky and I don't know what you need to do -> [remove or rephrase to maintain supportive tone] (Register; B1; Medium)"
  ],
  "errors_by_category": {
    "Lexis": [
      {"excerpt": "say you abot", "correction": "tell you about", "comment": "Wrong verb pattern: 'tell someone about something', not 'say someone about'", "impact": "High", "cefr_threshold": "B1"},
      {"excerpt": "count your time", "correction": "track your time", "comment": "Unnatural collocation; 'track' or 'manage' time is standard", "impact": "Medium", "cefr_threshold": "B1"},
      {"excerpt": "a lot time", "correction": "a lot of time", "comment": "Missing preposition 'of' after 'a lot'", "impact": "Medium", "cefr_threshold": "A2"},
      {"excerpt": "Delite them", "correction": "Eliminate them", "comment": "'Delete' is for files/data; 'eliminate' or 'get rid of' for habits", "impact": "Medium", "cefr_threshold": "B1"}
    ],
    "Grammar": [
      {"excerpt": "what help me", "correction": "which help me", "comment": "Non-defining relative clause requires 'which' or 'that', not 'what'", "impact": "Medium", "cefr_threshold": "B1"},
      {"excerpt": "with very hard lifestyle", "correction": "with such a hard lifestyle", "comment": "Missing article and intensifier structure", "impact": "Medium", "cefr_threshold": "A2"},
      {"excerpt": "I reccommend more communicate", "correction": "I recommend communicating more", "comment": "Verb pattern: recommend + gerund, not recommend + more + infinitive", "impact": "High", "cefr_threshold": "B1"},
      {"excerpt": "look to life simplie", "correction": "look at life simply", "comment": "Wrong preposition 'to' instead of 'at'; adverb form needed", "impact": "Medium", "cefr_threshold": "A2"},
      {"excerpt": "In futcher good networking give you", "correction": "In the future, good networking will give you", "comment": "Missing article; future tense needed for prediction", "impact": "Medium", "cefr_threshold": "A2"},
      {"excerpt": "a lot opportunity", "correction": "a lot of opportunities", "comment": "Missing 'of'; opportunity should be plural", "impact": "Medium", "cefr_threshold": "A2"},
      {"excerpt": "need count", "correction": "need to count", "comment": "Need + to-infinitive required", "impact": "Medium", "cefr_threshold": "A2"},
      {"excerpt": "you think what you study", "correction": "you think that you study", "comment": "'What' cannot introduce a that-clause; use 'that' or omit", "impact": "Medium", "cefr_threshold": "B1"},
      {"excerpt": "hasn't free time", "correction": "don't have free time", "comment": "Wrong auxiliary: 'have' (possession) uses 'do/does' not 'has' for negation", "impact": "High", "cefr_threshold": "A2"},
      {"excerpt": "try note your day", "correction": "try noting your day", "comment": "Try + gerund for 'experiment with'; try + infinitive for 'attempt'", "impact": "Medium", "cefr_threshold": "B1"},
      {"excerpt": "habbits what take", "correction": "habits that take", "comment": "Relative pronoun 'that' or 'which' required, not 'what'", "impact": "Medium", "cefr_threshold": "B1"},
      {"excerpt": "live more free", "correction": "live more freely", "comment": "Adverb 'freely' needed to modify verb 'live'", "impact": "Low", "cefr_threshold": "A2"},
      {"excerpt": "tips help you", "correction": "tips will help you", "comment": "Future tense appropriate for prediction/promise", "impact": "Low", "cefr_threshold": "A2"}
    ],
    "Punctuation": [
      {"excerpt": "abot", "correction": "about", "comment": "Spelling error", "impact": "Medium", "cefr_threshold": "A1"},
      {"excerpt": "reccommend", "correction": "recommend", "comment": "Spelling: double 'c', single 'm'", "impact": "Medium", "cefr_threshold": "A2"},
      {"excerpt": "simplie", "correction": "simply", "comment": "Spelling error", "impact": "Medium", "cefr_threshold": "A2"},
      {"excerpt": "somr", "correction": "some", "comment": "Spelling/typo", "impact": "Low", "cefr_threshold": "A1"},
      {"excerpt": "futcher", "correction": "future", "comment": "Spelling error", "impact": "Medium", "cefr_threshold": "A2"},
      {"excerpt": "expirience", "correction": "experience", "comment": "Spelling: 'i' before 'e' except after 'c'", "impact": "Medium", "cefr_threshold": "A2"},
      {"excerpt": "habbits", "correction": "habits", "comment": "Spelling: single 'b'", "impact": "Medium", "cefr_threshold": "A2"},
      {"excerpt": "realy", "correction": "really", "comment": "Spelling: double 'l'", "impact": "Low", "cefr_threshold": "A2"},
      {"excerpt": "Delite", "correction": "Delete", "comment": "Spelling error", "impact": "Medium", "cefr_threshold": "A2"},
      {"excerpt": "beleave", "correction": "believe", "comment": "Spelling: 'i' before 'e' except after 'c'", "impact": "Medium", "cefr_threshold": "A2"},
      {"excerpt": "unlacky", "correction": "unlucky", "comment": "Spelling error", "impact": "Low", "cefr_threshold": "A2"},
      {"excerpt": "Firstly I", "correction": "Firstly, I", "comment": "Comma needed after introductory discourse marker", "impact": "Low", "cefr_threshold": "B1"},
      {"excerpt": "Also they", "correction": "Also, they", "comment": "Comma needed after introductory connector", "impact": "Low", "cefr_threshold": "B1"},
      {"excerpt": "Secondly you", "correction": "Secondly, you", "comment": "Comma needed after introductory discourse marker", "impact": "Low", "cefr_threshold": "B1"}
    ],

      {"excerpt": "two my own tips", "correction": "my two own tips", "comment": "Number should follow possessive: 'my two tips'", "impact": "Medium", "cefr_threshold": "A2"},
      {"excerpt": "can give somr motivation to you", "correction": "can give you some motivation", "comment": "Indirect object 'you' should precede direct object", "impact": "Medium", "cefr_threshold": "A2"}
    ],
    "Sentence structure": [],
    "Text organization": [],
    "Discourse markers": [],
    "Rhetorical features": [],

    ],
    "Incomprehensibility": []
  },
  "strengths": [
    {"item": "networking", "cefr_level": "B1", "category": "Vocabulary", "note": "B1+ vocabulary item; correctly used conceptually despite grammar errors around it"},
  ],
    "strengths": [
    {"item": "time management", "cefr_level": "B1", "category": "Vocabulary", "note": "B1 collocation; appropriate topic vocabulary"},
    {"item": "motivation", "cefr_level": "B1", "category": "Vocabulary", "note": "B1 vocabulary item"},
    {"item": "Firstly / Secondly / Also", "cefr_level": "B1", "category": "Discourse marker", "note": "Good attempt at B1 discourse organization; punctuation incomplete but markers correctly selected"},
    {"item": "If you think... try noting...", "cefr_level": "B1", "category": "Grammar", "note": "Attempt at conditional structure (B1); errors present but structure ambition is above level"}
  ],
  "feedback": "CEFR Level: A2. This text shows A2-level control with B1-level ambition. Strengths include use of discourse markers (Firstly, Secondly, Also) and vocabulary such as 'networking', 'motivation', and 'time management'. However, pervasive spelling errors (11+ words) and frequent grammar issues (verb patterns, relative pronouns, articles) indicate A2 control. The text is comprehensible throughout. Task achievement is partial (NC): the first tip addresses social support rather than time organization; the second tip is relevant. Applied borderline rule: selected lower level due to spelling density and basic grammar errors.",
  "next_steps": [
    "Focus on high-frequency spelling patterns: practice 'i before e' rule (believe, experience) and double consonant patterns (really, recommend).",
    "Review verb patterns: recommend + gerund ('recommend doing'), need + to-infinitive ('need to do'), try + gerund vs. infinitive distinction.",
    "Practice relative clauses: learn when to use 'which/that' vs. 'what' – 'what' cannot replace 'that' in relative clauses."
  ]
}
